/threads/cron/-t1-thread-create-tool-call--use-execute-tool----da4df35f-ccfb-4f3b-9613-9dd4d1c59fe1.md

# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

user: [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools. Check that the result contains a non-empty tools array and that each tool has a name and description. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything worked, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: Result contains a non-empty tools array with 25 tools on the first page. Each tool has both a name and description field. The tools array is properly structured with entries like:

- agent_ai-stream_ws-provider_models_GET (description: "Returns all available AI models...")
- agent_text-to-speech_POST (description: "Convert text to natural-sounding speech...")
- ai-run (description: "Delegate a task to a specialist AI agent...")

All tools have the required name and description fields.

STEP_OK
user: [T1b tool-help-detail] Call execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', input={'toolName':'generate_image'}. Check that the result contains a name, a description, and a parameters schema. End your reply with STEP_OK if all three were present, or FAILED: <what was missing> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: Result contains all three required elements:
- name: "generate_image" 
- description: "Generate an image from a text prompt using AI"
- parameters schema: Full JSON schema with properties for aspectRatio, model, prompt, quality, and size fields

STEP_OK
user: [T2 image-gen] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'red circle'}. Check that the result contains a non-empty imageUrl and a positive creditCost. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything was correct, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: STEP_OK
user: [T3a retry-branch] Say exactly: RETRY_RESPONSE STEP_OK
assistant: RETRY_RESPONSE STEP_OK
user: [T3b fork-branch] Say exactly: BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK
assistant: BRANCH_RESPONSE STEP_OK
